title: Legacy Lighting
description: Legacy console inspired lighting for Fabric, using Legacy4J's gamma and lightmap shaders by Wilyicaro.
body:
# Legacy Lighting

A lightweight mod that tries to replicate the legacy console edition lighting.

## Commands
**This mod uses a command based config system to alter gamma.**

* Set a gamma value - `/legacygamma set <value> (0.0 - 1.0)`
  - A value of `0` disables the gamma effect.
  - This does not affect the altered lightmap.
* Reload the mod's config - `/legacygamma reload`

## Credits

Core lighting logic and maths from the [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) mod by [Wilyicaro](https://modrinth.com/user/Wilyicaro).

Mod by Meelee35
